rationale: Re-assert every forall ensures verbatim for both post1_self_ and post2_self_ so z3 has matching trigger shapes in scope, then for each quantified field derive a combined `assert forall ... by` whose goal mentions both post-states — this forces z3 to instantiate the disjoint #![trigger]s at the same witness — and lift to `=~=` extensionality / direct equality for the non-quantified ensures.
